title: Security+Furniture Modpack
description: This project is a modpack for version 1.20.1 that adds furniture, security and Painting mods to the game
body:
# **📥 Installation**

![for Minecraft 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/002a00dc4347f864f340be47e95cf3d20f0a1ab8.png)


The modpack is for Forge 1.20.1 

# **❔What is added**

This modpack adds the following to Minecraft Forge 1.20.1:

## [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls)

This mod adds many new fences and walls that feel vanilla to Minecraft.

![Some walls and fences included in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6e30bcc12b42889e1b7b0268e37e65905784ef.png)

## [Macaws Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture)

This mod adds more furniture to Minecraft that work.


![Some peices of furniture included in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00c6de568b59b07ed79dd2a22d15c0ef2fffc0f1.png)

## [Macaws Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges)

This mod adds functional briges to Minecraft

![A bridge and its support in a swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2375e6b2fbd12264ff90d4bc29dd2ba6505074a9_0.webp)

**  so this didnt take hours to write I am going to skip the rest of the descriptions, all of Macaw's mods are included other than the holiday mod**

  here is [Macaw's Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)if you would like to download the mods independantly

## [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft)

This mod adds security features to keep your base secure so only you can walk in

 ![My friend getting blown up by a Trapped Diamond Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75fae7164012854ab640a17eed0272464bf0a3b_0.webp)

##  [PhonesCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/phonescraft)

 This mod adds roleplay phones to the game

 ![The PhonesCraft creative menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e58d418bc3b43e09e4287f5a34a0a4a662454e9c.png)

##  [PizzaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pizzacraft)

 This mod adds pizza to the game

 ![Cooking a cheese pizza](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbd0733f52b76c060f043e6c93e79402e69d7fba.png)


##  [WorldEdit Mod (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit)

 An in game map editor!
 
 [Setting the first PoS for a worldedit selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2249da1910aabd47494255de105ec40396aa2267.png)

##  [Joy of Painting](https://april-fools-2025.modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)

 This mod allows painting in Minecraft

 ![A painting of the sunset on an easel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/585cfce9239b9e146e63191ee48afcd856edd980.png)

## [More Concrete](https://april-fools-2025.modrinth.com/mod/more-concrete)

This mod adds concrete varients like Stairs and Slabs

![Some concrete slabs, stairs and some concrete redstone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01eee783546d217f0f9403e33501c4cba04f0471.png)

# [Hardcore Revival](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-revival)

This mod lets you revive players (If you can make it in time!)
![Death Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53a1f9e8b11ee5701fb3a569635f939f8841524e.jpeg)
![Waiting for revival](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f190560d3c098e5bc8828ddd686b78ad31142420.jpeg)

# **⚠️NOTE**

This project is not perfect. Please excpect some bugs. As releases go on, more of them will be resolved.
